summary: Iteration 120 - Safety Gate Bypass Tests & Pro-Zone Broadcast Restrictions. All tests PASSED. Verified: (1) Unauthenticated users accessing /map, /feed, /messages are correctly redirected to /auth, (2) Grom signup REQUIRES parent_email - blocks truly unlinked Groms, (3) Pro-Zone check endpoint exists and responds correctly, (4) Grom Parent with no nearby Pro returns can_go_live=true, (5) Hobbyist/Grom Parent are restricted by Pro-Zone, Surfer/Grom are NOT, (6) Haversine distance calculation is accurate (0.5 mile radius detection working).
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py (lines 110-111): Grom signup correctly requires parent_email or parent_username - blocks truly unlinked Groms
social_live.py (lines 190-257): Pro-Zone check endpoint correctly checks HOBBYIST and GROM_PARENT roles only
social_live.py (lines 260-334): start_social_live correctly blocks Hobbyist/Grom Parent within 0.5 miles of active Pro
App.js (lines 118-121): ProtectedRoute correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /auth with redirect param
App.js (lines 129-134): GromSafetyGate wrapper correctly applied to Grom users on non-allowed routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Safety Gate bypass and Pro-Zone tests verified. Key findings: (1) Unauthenticated access to /map, /feed, /messages correctly redirects to /auth with redirect param preserved, (2) Grom signup requires parent_email - returns 400 'Parent/Guardian email or username required for Grom accounts' if missing, (3) Pro-Zone check at /api/social-live/pro-zone-check works correctly - returns can_go_live=true when no active Pros nearby, (4) Only HOBBYIST and GROM_PARENT roles are affected by Pro-Zone restrictions, (5) Haversine distance calculation accurate - 0.5 mile radius detection working.
